{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/obsidian/glossary/components-by-name.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

----
title: "Компоненты — алфавитный список с обратными ссылками"
tags:
  * glossary
date: 2026-04-29
----

h1. Компоненты — алфавитный список с обратными ссылками


{quote}Для каждого проекта / технологии / паттерна — все доки в монорепозитории, где он упоминается. Если компонент имеет собственную карточку, она указана первой.{quote}
_Проекты:_ Svyazi, CardIndex, AgentFS, knowledge-space, mclaude, AI Factory, Rufler, LiteParse

----


h2. Содержание

* [A|#a]
* [B|#b]
* [C|#c]
* [D|#d]
* [E|#e]
* [F|#f]
* [G|#g]
* [H|#h]
* [K|#k]
* [L|#l]
* [M|#m]
* [N|#n]
* [O|#o]
* [P|#p]
* [R|#r]
* [S|#s]
* [T|#t]
* [V|#v]
* [W|#w]
* [Y|#y]
* [Z|#z]

----






Для каждого проекта / технологии / паттерна — все доки в монорепозитории, где он упоминается. Если компонент имеет собственную карточку, она указана первой.

h2. A

* _AgentFS_ — [[agentfs|карточка]] · [[A-collaboration-os|Ансамбль A]] · [[G-federated-local-graph|Ансамбль G]] · [[01-shared-memory-between-agents|Cross‑Agent Memory Bus]] · [[1-agentic-knowledge-os|Agentic Knowledge OS]]
* _Agent‑Bridge_ — [[09-agent-orchestration-stack|Agent Orchestration Stack (комбо 9)]] · [[14-local-first-agent-development-environment|Local‑First Dev Env (комбо 14)]]
* _agent-memory-mcp_ — [[agent-memory-mcp|карточка]] · [[memory-write-policy|Memory Write Policy]]
* _Agent-pool_ — [[2-distributed-agent-workshop|Distributed Agent Workshop]]
* _AI Factory + AIF Handoff_ — [[ai-factory|карточка]] · [[C-multi-agent-factory|Ансамбль C]] · [[H-research-to-product-flywheel|Ансамбль H]] · [[2-distributed-agent-workshop|Distributed Agent Workshop]]
* _Anthropic Skills_ — [[self-aware-mcp|Self‑Aware MCP + Skills + CodeWiki]] · [[2-pkm-mcp-skills|PKM × MCP/Skills]]
* _A2A protocol_ — [[03-a2a-vs-mcp-protocols|A2A vs MCP, ансамбль H]]
* _AutoResearch_ — [[autoresearch-sequential|карточка]] · [[C-multi-agent-factory|Ансамбль C]] · [[H-research-to-product-flywheel|Ансамбль H]] · [[2-autoresearch-legal|AutoResearch для legal]] · [[7-autoresearch-distributed|AutoResearch × Distributed Roy (deep pair 7)]]
* _Auto AI Router_ — [[security-routing-plane|Security + routing plane]] · [[E-execution-plane|Ансамбль E]] · [[02-multiagentnyy-khaos-reshenie-auto-ai-router|Комбинация 2]] · [[08-conductor-adversarial-review-auto-ai-router|Комбинация 8]]

h2. B

* _Biome / Ruff / uv_ — [[continuation-10-domains|Continuation 10 domains]]
* _ByteRover_ — [[05-supplementary-infrastructure|Supplementary infrastructure]]

h2. C

* _CardIndex_ (Svyazi) — [[card-envelope|Card Envelope]] · [[svyazi]] · [[A-collaboration-os|Ансамбль A]] · [[03-crdt-local-first-svyazi-cardindex|Комбинация 3]]
* _CatBoost_ — [[22-russian-international-oss-stack|Комбинация 22]]
* _Claude Code_ — [[05-sourcecraft-cli-claude-code-sequential-protokol-dochkinoy|Комбинация 5]] · [[3-adversarial-multi-ide|Adversarial × Multi‑IDE (deep pair 3)]]
* _ClickHouse_ — [[20-hybrid-olap-oltp-with-real-time-sync|Комбинация 20]] · [[21-legal-corpus-analytics-at-scale|Комбинация 21]] · [[33-event-sourcing-cqrs-clickhouse-analytics|Комбинация 33]] · [[04-event-sourcing-consensus|Mega‑Stack 4.0]]
* _CoAlly_ — [[01-shared-memory-between-agents|Cross‑Agent Memory Bus]]
* _Conductor_ — [[08-conductor-adversarial-review-auto-ai-router|Комбинация 8]] · [[09-agent-orchestration-stack|Комбинация 9]]
* _CodeWiki_ — [[self-aware-mcp|Self‑Aware MCP + Skills + CodeWiki]] · [[C-multi-agent-factory|Ансамбль C]]
* _CRDT (Yjs / Automerge)_ — [[yjs-automerge|Yjs + Automerge]] · [[D-voice-first-mesh|Ансамбль D]] · [[G-federated-local-graph|Ансамбль G]] · [[03-crdt-local-first-svyazi-cardindex|Комбинация 3]] · [[11-hybrid-crdt-sql-database|Комбинация 11]] · [[3-crdt-self-hosted|CRDT × Self‑hosted (software pair 3)]]
* _Crawl4AI_ — [[07-crawl4ai-docling-yodoca-consolidator|Комбинация 7]] · [[15-self-consolidating-legal-corpus|Комбинация 15]] · [[18-llm-powered-legal-corpus-builder|Комбинация 18]] · [[21-legal-corpus-analytics-at-scale|Комбинация 21]]

h2. D

* _Docling_ — [[07-crawl4ai-docling-yodoca-consolidator|Комбинация 7]] · [[10-legal-document-intelligence-pipeline|Комбинация 10]] · [[15-self-consolidating-legal-corpus|Комбинация 15]] · [[2-autoresearch-legal|AutoResearch legal]]
* _Дочкина (Sequential протокол)_ — [[autoresearch-sequential|AutoResearch + Sequential]] · [[04-dochkina-sequential|Dochkina Sequential]] · [[05-sourcecraft-cli-claude-code-sequential-protokol-dochkinoy|Комбинация 5]]
* _DuckDB / Turso / pgvector_ — [[continuation-10-domains|Continuation 10 domains]]

h2. E

* _Ebbinghaus decay_ — [[yodoca]] · [[memory-write-policy|Memory Write Policy]] · [[15-self-consolidating-legal-corpus|Комбинация 15]] · [[01-yodoca|Habr key‑findings — Yodoca]]
* _Event Sourcing_ — [[31-event-sourced-legal-document-history|Комбинация 31]] · [[04-event-sourcing-consensus|Mega‑Stack 4.0]] · [[03-pda-llm-as-periphery|PDA — LLM как периферия]]
* _Extropic / Normal Computing (TSU)_ — [[2-tsu-mome|Hardware pair 2 — TSU × MoME]]

h2. F

* _Forward Deployed Engineer (FDE)_ — [[02-primary-fde|Initial primary match]] · [[01-fde-downgraded|Reanalysis: FDE downgraded]]

h2. G

* _Graph RAG_ — [[graph-rag|карточка]] · [[B-forensic-rag|Ансамбль B]] · [[04-parsing-s-llm-graph-rag-pravilnaya-agentskaya-arkhitektura|Комбинация 4]] · [[22-russian-international-oss-stack|Комбинация 22]] · [[27-hybrid-rag-with-ast-chunked-code|Комбинация 27]] · [[3-forensic-rag|Forensic RAG (ai‑collab ансамбль 3)]]

h2. H

* _Handy / OpenWhispr / GigaAM_ (voice stack) — [[voice-stack|Voice / local-first stack]] · [[D-voice-first-mesh|Ансамбль D]] · [[4-speech-to-text-llm|Speech‑to‑text × LLM (software pair 4)]] · [[5-voice-local-memory|Voice × local memory (deep pair 5)]]
* _Hybrid RAG_ — [[hybrid-rag|карточка]] · [[B-forensic-rag|Ансамбль B]] · [[2-document-rag|Document RAG (deep pair 2)]]
* _Huginn_ — [[1-workflow-llm-mcp|Software pair 1]]

h2. K

* _K2-18 (Романов)_ — [[01-three-direct-analogues|Three direct analogues]] · [[01-three-key-candidates|Three key candidates]]
* _Knowledge Graph Kit_ — [[02-related-projects|Related projects]] · [[02-related-projects-context|Related projects context]]
* _knowledge-space_ — [[knowledge-space|карточка]] · [[A-collaboration-os|Ансамбль A]] · [[H-research-to-product-flywheel|Ансамбль H]] · [[1-agentic-knowledge-os|Agentic Knowledge OS]]

h2. L

* _Langfuse / TraceDebugger_ — [[02-agentops-trace-envelope|AgentOps + Trace Envelope]]
* _LangGraph_ — [[07-vs-notion-mem-affine-langgraph|vs Notion/Mem/AFFiNE/LangGraph]] · [[03-a2a-vs-mcp-protocols|A2A vs MCP]]
* _Legal RAG_ — [[legal-rag|карточка]] · [[B-forensic-rag|Ансамбль B]] · [[08-commercialization-three-paths|Commercialization B]]
* _LiteLLM_ — [[security-routing-plane|Security + routing plane]] · [[E-execution-plane|Ансамбль E]] · [[1-llm-gateway|Deep pair 1 — LLM gateway]]
* _LiteParse / research-docs_ — [[research-docs-liteparse|карточка]] · [[B-forensic-rag|Ансамбль B]] · [[F-evidence-backed-intake|Ансамбль F]] · [[3-forensic-rag|Forensic RAG (ai‑collab)]]

h2. M

* _Mamba (SSM)_ — [[1-neuromorphic-ssm|Hardware pair 1 — Neuromorphic × SSM]]
* _mclaude_ — [[mclaude|карточка]] · [[C-multi-agent-factory|Ансамбль C]] · [[H-research-to-product-flywheel|Ансамбль H]] · [[2-distributed-agent-workshop|Distributed Agent Workshop]]
* _MCP (Model Context Protocol)_ — [[self-aware-mcp|Self‑Aware MCP]] · [[03-a2a-vs-mcp-protocols|A2A vs MCP]] · [[5-tinyml-mcp-skills|Hardware pair 5]] · [[2-pkm-mcp-skills|PKM × MCP]] · [[8-self-aware-mcp-specs|Self‑aware MCP × Specs]]
* _Memory OS_ — [[agent-memory-mcp|карточка]] · [[card-envelope|Card Envelope]] · [[memory-write-policy|Memory Write Policy]] · [[1-agentic-knowledge-os|Agentic Knowledge OS]]
* _MemNet_ — [[memnet|карточка]] · [[02-memnet|Habr key‑findings — MemNet]]

h2. N

* _Node-RED_ — [[1-workflow-llm-mcp|Software pair 1]]
* _NGT Memory_ — [[ngt-memory|карточка]] · [[A-collaboration-os|Ансамбль A]] · [[G-federated-local-graph|Ансамбль G]] · [[01-three-key-candidates|Three key candidates]]
* _Нейроморфные процессоры (Loihi, TrueNorth, BrainScaleS, Алтай)_ — [[1-neuromorphic-ssm|Hardware pair 1]]

h2. O

* _Obsidian / Logseq / Foam_ (PKM) — [[2-pkm-mcp-skills|PKM × MCP/Skills]] · [[4-skill-catalogs-subagents|Skill catalogs × Subagents]]
* _OpenClaude_ — [[06-openclaude-utyokshiy-claude-code-zinc-inference-engine-mome-|Комбинация 6]] · [[14-local-first-agent-development-environment|Комбинация 14]] · [[6-tmux-village-openclaw|Tmux Village × OpenClaw]] · [[04-memory-firewall-vs-prompt-worms|Memory Firewall]]

h2. P

* _Paxos / Raft_ — [[32-consensus-based-multi-agent-coordination|Комбинация 32]] · [[34-distributed-event-store-with-paxos|Комбинация 34]] · [[04-event-sourcing-consensus|Mega‑Stack 4.0]]
* _PostgreSQL 18 async_ — [[11-hybrid-crdt-sql-database|Комбинация 11]] · [[20-hybrid-olap-oltp-with-real-time-sync|Комбинация 20]]
* _PDA-бот (Possibility-Driven Architecture)_ — [[03-pda-llm-as-periphery|Habr key‑findings — PDA]]
* _Prompt Worms / OpenClaw audit_ — [[04-memory-firewall-vs-prompt-worms|Memory Firewall]] · [[default-policy|Default policy]]
* _Pydantic_ — [[25-legal-dsl-code-transpiler|Комбинация 25]] · [[28-pydantic-enforced-legal-workflows|Комбинация 28]] · [[03-dsl-ast|Mega‑Stack 3.0]]

h2. R

* _RISC-V (Alibaba XuanTie C950)_ — [[4-riscv-privacy|Hardware pair 4]]
* _RRAM / CBRAM мемристоры_ — [[6-bonus-rram-memristor|Hardware bonus]]
* _Rufler_ — [[rufler|карточка]] · [[C-multi-agent-factory|Ансамбль C]] · [[2-distributed-agent-workshop|Distributed Agent Workshop]]

h2. S

* _SENTINEL_ — [[security-routing-plane|Security + routing plane]] · [[E-execution-plane|Ансамбль E]] · [[default-policy|Default policy]] · [[04-memory-firewall-vs-prompt-worms|Memory Firewall]]
* _Self-Aware MCP_ — [[self-aware-mcp|карточка]] · [[F-evidence-backed-intake|Ансамбль F]] · [[G-federated-local-graph|Ансамбль G]] · [[8-self-aware-mcp-specs|Self-aware MCP × Specs]]
* _Skate_ — [[2-distributed-agent-workshop|Distributed Agent Workshop]]
* _SourceCraft CLI_ — [[05-sourcecraft-cli-claude-code-sequential-protokol-dochkinoy|Комбинация 5]]
* _Svyazi_ — [[svyazi|карточка]] · во всех ансамблях A‑H · [[01-pravilnaya-agentskaya-arkhitektura-svyazi-pattern|Комбинация 1]] · [[03-crdt-local-first-svyazi-cardindex|Комбинация 3]] · [[18-llm-powered-legal-corpus-builder|Комбинация 18]]

h2. T

* _tg-chat-analyser_ — [[05-supplementary-infrastructure|Supplementary infrastructure]]
* _TimescaleDB_ — [[11-hybrid-crdt-sql-database|Комбинация 11]] · [[01-legal-ai-stack|Mega‑Stack 1.0]]
* _TinyML / TinyChat_ — [[5-tinyml-mcp-skills|Hardware pair 5]]
* _Tool Search_ — [[security-routing-plane|Security + routing plane]] · [[skill-tool-policy|Skill and Tool Policy]]
* _TSU (Thermodynamic Sampling Unit)_ — [[2-tsu-mome|Hardware pair 2]]

h2. V

* _VictoriaMetrics / VictoriaLogs / VictoriaTraces_ — [[sozialrecht-35-combinations|Sozialrecht report]]

h2. W

* _Wikontic_ — [[01-three-direct-analogues|Three direct analogues]] · [[01-three-key-candidates|Three key candidates]]
* _Windmill_ — [[1-workflow-llm-mcp|Software pair 1]]

h2. Y

* _YDB / Tarantool DB 3.0_ — [[sozialrecht-35-combinations|Sozialrecht report]]
* _Yjs / Automerge_ — см. _CRDT_ выше
* _Yodoca_ — [[yodoca|карточка]] · [[A-collaboration-os|Ансамбль A]] · [[F-evidence-backed-intake|Ансамбль F]] · [[01-yodoca|Habr key‑findings — Yodoca]] · [[07-crawl4ai-docling-yodoca-consolidator|Комбинация 7]] · [[15-self-consolidating-legal-corpus|Комбинация 15]]

h2. Z

* _ZINC inference engine (Zig/Vulkan)_ — [[06-openclaude-utyokshiy-claude-code-zinc-inference-engine-mome-|Комбинация 6]] · [[3-zinc-hybrid-arch|Hardware pair 3]]



----

_Смотрите также:_
* [[authors-by-name]]
* [[concepts]]
* [[PRIORITIES]]
* [[source-projects]]




----

_Похожие документы:_
* [[README]] (сходство 0.27)
* [[authors-by-name]] (сходство 0.24)
* [[PRIORITIES]] (сходство 0.19)
